name: Church Pool area (Farmington River WB TMA, Riverton)
notes: Classic year-round TMA pool below Riverton.

name: Bulls Bridge (Housatonic River TMA, Kent)
notes: Parking at the covered bridge; TMA water up and downstream.

name: Comstock Covered Bridge (Salmon River TMA, East Hampton)
notes: Main entry to the Salmon River TMA in the state forest.

name: Willimantic River TMA roadside access (Rt 32, Willington)
notes: Pull-offs along the catch-and-release TMA reach.

name: Hammonasset River TMA (Chestnut Hill Rd, Killingworth)
notes: TMA runs from Lake Hammonasset dam to Chestnut Hill Rd.
